pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-010 (Risk and Compliance) scores 0.469 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for DataOps Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk and Compliance KSA RC-T-010 as a discrete competency for DataOps Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for DataOps Engineer.

decision_rationale: Risk and Compliance is out of scope for DataOps Engineer.
